page: Microsoft Azure M416ds_8_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MDSHighMemoryv3 family. It features 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 7600.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 18.27 GB per vCPU.

This server includes 410 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. It does not include any GPUs, making it a CPU-bound, memory-centric resource. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this configuration.

Given the massive memory capacity and high dedicated vCPU count, this instance represents a high-end hardware class designed for resource-dense enterprise applications. It is qualitatively positioned for workloads that require massive memory footprints, such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data analytics pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure M416ds_8_v3 is a high-memory, x86_64 architecture server within the MDSHighMemoryv3 family, virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and is equipped with 7600.0 GB of RAM, providing 18.27 GB of memory per core. The instance includes 410 GB of local storage, is Premium Storage capable, and contains no GPUs. Designed for massive scale, this server is optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, heavy data analytics, and enterprise resource planning systems that demand substantial memory capacity and high dedicated compute resources without GPU acceleration. This configuration offers a high-density resource profile tailored for mission-critical applications requiring extreme memory allocations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416ds_8_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 7600.0 GB of RAM, and 410 GB of local storage, designed for massive enterprise databases.

tagline: A massive memory-optimized virtual server featuring four hundred sixteen dedicated cores and over seven terabytes of system memory.
